---
name: Suggest a record
about: Missing a case, a person, or an examination? Name it and we will investigate it for the corpus.
title: "Record suggestion: "
labels: record-suggestion
---

**What or who is missing?**
Name the claim, device, experiment, examination, or person.

**When did it happen?**
A year or range is enough.

**Where is it documented?**
Anything helps — a paper, a patent, a book, a contemporary article, a video.
Records graded D5 or better require a citable source; poorly documented cases
are welcome too and are graded exactly as what they are.

**Anything else worth knowing?**
Replication attempts, examinations, retractions, disputes — the connections
are the point of the timeline.

---
*Every suggestion is compiled under the [EQO standard](https://github.com/shredEngineer/eqo):
graded coordinates, never verdicts. Suggestions become records through the same
gates as everything else here.*
